## reference · AI platform citation source index 2026 top websites brand visibility

* 50 websites decide what brands are visible inside AI platforms like ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini, and Google AI overviews.
* The 50 websites are not explicitly listed in the provided source.
* PR Newswire is one of the websites that decides what brands are visible.
* The websites that decide what brands are visible are likely to be news and media outlets.
* The AI platform citation source index 2026 is released by 5W.
